content.en:
Rumble!!!

The attack of the Void Snake fell on Ye Tian and them, and the Ten Elements Ancestors of the half-step perfect controller stubbornly resisted these impacts, and Ye Tian did the same.

Ye Tian didn't rely on the blessing of the will of the other half-step perfect controllers, and just relied on his own strength to resist it.

However, there are too many false snakes here.

The Primordial Ancestor said that there were only a few Illusory Snakes comparable to those of a half-step Perfect Master, but in fact, who knows how many Void Snakes were comparable to those of a half-step Perfect Master?

In case the intelligence goes wrong, they're in trouble.

Therefore, they did not fight these vain serpents, and even if they could have killed them, there was no need.

Wow!

The Primal Ancestor led the way, and everyone kept shuttling and rushing out of the encirclement of these vain snakes.

It didn't take long for them to break out of the encirclement and come to an incomparably large space-time void.

"This is it, let's go!"

Taichu Ancestor Dao.

Whoa!!

Everyone instantly entered this large space-time void and began to shuttle in the space-time void.

Time passed slowly, and it was a long time before they rushed out from the other end.

"Everyone, the Void Serpent Territory just now is the most dangerous place, and there is no danger in the future. Of course, at the end of the world, anything can happen, so everyone still needs to be vigilant. The Primal Ancestor reminded.

"I'll understand!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor and others responded.

Afterwards, the group continued on their way, and the rest of the journey was only boring, but there was no danger.

After all, the end of the realm is too big, boundless, and most of the areas are empty, so the possibility of encountering danger is not very great, but many areas are forbidden areas for the ten realm-level masters, and it is easy to get lost once you enter.

But if the half-step perfect controller leads the way, the possibility of getting lost is still very low.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian's body is still cultivating here, although he is in a hurry to copy his body, he has not wasted time, and his body is constantly improving his strength.

With the passage of time, he mastered a kind of Dao to the level of a billion changes, forming the mark of change of the Dao.

And his strength is also improving, but at his current level, it is much more difficult to improve his strength, and there is no way to easily skyrocket his strength.

"I hope that after arriving at the Eternal Ruins, I can copy a lot of perfect-level ancestral endowments!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

If he copied a lot of perfect-level ancestral endowments, then his growth speed would be terrifyingly improved.

Other than that.

He is also constantly collecting primordial black qi, and then cooperating with the life white stone to constantly impact the shackles and chains, as long as he breaks the shackles and chains, his strength will still improve a lot.

Time flies.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's copy body followed the Primal Ancestor, and they had already traveled for nearly a billion realm river years.

At this time, they traveled through the end of the realm and met some cultivators.

"It's almost the ruins of eternity!"

Taichu Ancestor said excitedly.

And the Ten Elements Ancestors are also very excited, after all, coming to the Eternal Ruins means that they have a broader space for growth in the future, and they have the hope of becoming perfect controllers!

At this moment, the Primal Ancestor reminded: "Several, when you arrive at the Ruins of Eternity, you must restrain your arrogance, in the Origin Realm Sea, we are invincible existences, but not in the Ruins of Eternity, don't offend or provoke people casually, be as low-key as possible." "

"Hmm!"

The Ten Elements Ancestors nodded one after another.

And coming to the Ruins of Eternity, they have several choices to choose from.

"Everyone, after you enter the Ruins of Eternity, do you choose to become a casual cultivator, or do you want to join my faction?" asked the Primal Ancestor.

The Primordial Ancestor said, "Primordial Ancestor, how is the force you are in?"

The Primal Ancestor immediately introduced: "The force I am in is called Azure Pavilion, and it has a perfect controller, more than seven hundred half-step perfect controllers, and as for the ordinary eternal controllers, there are hundreds of thousands!"

As soon as they heard that the Azure Pavilion had more than seven hundred half-step perfect controllers, the Ten Elements Ancestors gasped.

There were only a few half-step perfect controllers of the Origin Realm Sea, and there were so many in the Azure Pavilion.

"What is the strength of the Azure Pavilion in the Eternal Ruins?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

Taichu Ancestor said lightly: "It's above average!"

Upper Average?

As soon as Ye Tian heard this, he knew that the strength of the Azure Pavilion was average, perhaps it was an incomparably terrifying force for the Origin Realm Sea, but it was average when placed in the Eternal Ruins.

Joining such a force has a limited future, and it is too difficult to become the eternal master.

After all, the Azure Pavilion has only been a perfect controller so far, and the other more than seven hundred half-step perfect controllers are still half-step perfect controllers.

As a result, he will not join the Azure Court.

However, if he doesn't join, it doesn't mean that other half-step perfect controllers are unwilling to join.

Selfless True Ancestor, Realm Ancestor, Black Emperor Ancestor, several of them expressed their willingness to join the Azure Pavilion one by one.

After all, joining the Azure Pavilion is equivalent to having a backer, otherwise if you continue to live in the Eternal Ruins in the way of casual cultivation, who knows what the result will be?

In the end, only the Primordial Ancestor, the Primordial Master, the Ten Elements Ancestor, the Black Decay Master, and Ye Tian did not join the Azure Pavilion.

Some time passed, and the ruins of eternity arrived.

"Primordial Ancestor, Ten Elements Ancestor, since you are unwilling to join the Azure Pavilion, let's separate here, I need to take others to participate in the assessment of the Azure Pavilion. "The Primal Ancestor said.

"Okay, thank you Taichu Ancestor this time!"

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

Subsequently, the Primal Ancestor gave the Ten Elements Ancestor a map of the Eternal Ruins and a simple introduction to the forces, so that they would not be very confused.

The Ruins of Eternity are huge and powerful, and they don't exclude half-step perfect masters, not even those who have eternal controls.

"Master, let's find a place to settle down first!"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Good!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded.

Afterwards, they discussed it and decided to go to the ancient city of Tai Ying City first.

The city is open to the public, and the lord of the city is a perfect controller, willing to protect all living beings in the city, but if you want to live in the city, you need to pay a certain fee.

The Ruins of Eternity have a currency called the Crystal of Perfection, which is needed to live in the City of the Underworld.

Not long after, Ye Tian came to Tai Ying City, and then exchanged the treasure resources on his body for a lot of perfect crystals, and rented a palace here as a residence, and will live here in the future.

The Primordial Ancestor and the Ten Elements Ancestor let the will clone investigate the situation, and by the way, they wanted to join some more powerful forces.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, condensed the third copy body.

That's right, he can continue to copy his body, which is a new ability that he has when his copy talent is upgraded.

In other words, he now has three more bodies, and all three bodies can condense the will clone, adding up to six bodies.

With such ability, as long as he does not die, it will be difficult for him to fall in the ruins of eternity.

Soon, the copy body was condensed, and Ye Tian asked this copy body to find a creature with a perfect level ancestral endowment.

"I hope I can find a few creatures with a perfect-level ancestral endowment!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.
